use_cases: Visualize CPU architecture and internals in educational contexts
Illustrate hardware diagrams in technical documentation
Display connection pathways in dev tools interfaces
Show data flow between CPU components in presentations
Enhance technical blog posts or articles about computer architecture
ai_summary: An animated SVG component that renders a stylized CPU architecture diagram with multiple connecting paths and optional text labels. Features configurable animations for lines and markers, making it ideal for educational content, technical documentation, or developer-focused interfaces that need to visualize computer hardware concepts.
